51:         "MultipleStringLiterals"})
52: public class AllureCommandline {
53: 
54:     public static final String ALLURE_DEFAULT_VERSION = "2.13.9";
55: 
56:     private static final int DEFAULT_TIMEOUT = 3600;
57: 
58:     private final String version;
59: 
60:     private final int timeout;
61: 
62:     private final Path installationDirectory;
63: 
64:     public AllureCommandline(final Path installationDirectory, final String version) {
65:         this(installationDirectory, version, DEFAULT_TIMEOUT);
66:     }
67: 
68:     public AllureCommandline(final Path installationDirectory, final String version,
69:             final int timeout) {
70:         this.installationDirectory = installationDirectory;
71:         this.version = version != null ? version : ALLURE_DEFAULT_VERSION;
72:         this.timeout = timeout;
73:     }
74: 
75:     public int generateReport(final List<Path> resultsPaths, final Path reportPath)
76:             throws IOException {
77: 
78:         this.checkAllureExists();
79: 
80:         FileUtils.deleteQuietly(reportPath.toFile());
81: 
82:         final CommandLine commandLine =
83:                 new CommandLine(getAllureExecutablePath().toAbsolutePath().toFile());
84:         commandLine.addArgument("generate");
85:         commandLine.addArgument("--clean");
86:         for (Path resultsPath : resultsPaths) {
87:             commandLine.addArgument(resultsPath.toAbsolutePath().toString(), true);
88:         }
89:         commandLine.addArgument("-o");
90:         commandLine.addArgument(reportPath.toAbsolutePath().toString(), true);
91: 
92:         return execute(commandLine, timeout);
93:     }
94: 
95:     public int serve(final List<Path> resultsPaths, final Path reportPath, final String serveHost,
96:             final Integer servePort) throws IOException {
97: 
98:         this.checkAllureExists();
99: 
100:         FileUtils.deleteQuietly(reportPath.toFile());
101: 
102:         final CommandLine commandLine =
103:                 new CommandLine(getAllureExecutablePath().toAbsolutePath().toFile());
104:         commandLine.addArgument("serve");
105:         if (serveHost != null && serveHost.matches("(\\d{1,3}\\.){3}\\d{1,3}")) {
106:             commandLine.addArgument("--host");
107:             commandLine.addArgument(serveHost);
108:         }
109:         if (servePort > 0) {
110:             commandLine.addArgument("--port");
111:             commandLine.addArgument(Objects.toString(servePort));
112:         }
113:         for (Path resultsPath : resultsPaths) {
114:             commandLine.addArgument(resultsPath.toAbsolutePath().toString(), true);
115:         }
116:         return execute(commandLine, timeout);
117:     }
118: 
119:     private void checkAllureExists() throws FileNotFoundException {
120:         if (allureNotExists()) {
121:             throw new FileNotFoundException("There is no valid allure installation."
122:                     + " Make sure you're using allure version not less then 2.x.");
123:         }
124:     }
125: 
126:     private int execute(final CommandLine commandLine, final int timeout) throws IOException {
127:         final DefaultExecutor executor = new DefaultExecutor();
128:         final ExecuteWatchdog watchdog = new ExecuteWatchdog(TimeUnit.SECONDS.toMillis(timeout));
129:         executor.setWatchdog(watchdog);
130:         executor.setExitValue(0);
131:         return executor.execute(commandLine);
132:     }
133: 
134:     private Path getAllureExecutablePath() {
135:         final String allureExecutable = isWindows() ? "allure.bat" : "allure";
136:         return getAllureHome().resolve("bin").resolve(allureExecutable);
137:     }
138: 
139:     private Path getAllureHome() {
140:         return installationDirectory.resolve(String.format("allure-%s", version));
141:     }
142: 
143:     public boolean allureExists() {
144:         final Path allureExecutablePath = getAllureExecutablePath();
145:         return Files.exists(allureExecutablePath) && Files.isExecutable(allureExecutablePath);
146:     }
147: 
148:     public boolean allureNotExists() {
149:         return !allureExists();
150:     }
151: 
152:     public void downloadWithMaven(final MavenSession session,
153:             final DependencyResolver dependencyResolver) throws IOException {
154:         final ProjectBuildingRequest buildingRequest =
155:                 new DefaultProjectBuildingRequest(session.getProjectBuildingRequest());
156:         buildingRequest.setResolveDependencies(false);
157: 
158:         final Dependency cliDep = new Dependency();
159:         cliDep.setGroupId("io.qameta.allure");
160:         cliDep.setArtifactId("allure-commandline");
161:         cliDep.setVersion(version);
162:         cliDep.setType("zip");
163: 
164:         try {
165:             final Iterator<ArtifactResult> resolved =
166:                     dependencyResolver.resolveDependencies(buildingRequest,
167:                             Collections.singletonList(cliDep), null, null).iterator();
168: 
169:             if (resolved.hasNext()) {
170:                 unpack(resolved.next().getArtifact().getFile());
171:             } else {
172:                 throw new IOException("No allure commandline artifact found.");
173: 
174:             }
175:         } catch (DependencyResolverException e) {
176:             throw new IOException("Cannot resolve allure commandline dependencies.", e);
177:         }
178:     }
179: 
180:     public void download(final String allureDownloadUrl, final Proxy mavenProxy)
181:             throws IOException {
182:         if (allureExists()) {
183:             return;
184:         }
185: 
186:         final Path allureZip = Files.createTempFile("allure", version);
187:         final String allureUrl = String.format(allureDownloadUrl, version, version);
188:         final URL url = new URL(allureUrl);
189: 
190:         if (mavenProxy != null && version != null) {
191:             final InetSocketAddress proxyAddress =
192:                     new InetSocketAddress(mavenProxy.getHost(), mavenProxy.getPort());
193: 
194:             if (mavenProxy.getUsername() != null && mavenProxy.getPassword() != null) {
195:                 final String proxyUser = mavenProxy.getUsername();
196:                 final String proxyPassword = mavenProxy.getPassword();
197: 
198:                 Authenticator.setDefault(new Authenticator() {
199:                     @Override

201:                         return new PasswordAuthentication(proxyUser, proxyPassword.toCharArray());

207:             final InputStream inputStream = url.openConnection(proxy).getInputStream();
208:             Files.copy(inputStream, allureZip, StandardCopyOption.REPLACE_EXISTING);
209:         } else {
210:             FileUtils.copyURLToFile(url, allureZip.toFile());
211:         }
212:

220:         } catch (ZipException e) {
221:             throw new IOException(e);
222:         }
223: 
224:         final Path allureExecutable = getAllureExecutablePath();
225:         if (Files.exists(allureExecutable)) {
226:             allureExecutable.toFile().setExecutable(true);
227:         }

```
package net.lingala.zip4j.core does not exist
```

Looking at line 18 of AllureCommandline.java:
```java
import net.lingala.zip4j.core.ZipFile;
```

And line 19:
```java
import net.lingala.zip4j.exception.ZipException;
```

This is a known issue - in newer versions of zip4j (version 2.0+), the package structure changed:
- Old: `net.lingala.zip4j.core.ZipFile`
- New: `net.lingala.zip4j.ZipFile`

The `core` package was removed in zip4j 2.x, and the `ZipFile` class was moved directly to `net.lingala.zip4j`.

parts.text:
All tasks completed successfully. Here's a summary:

**Compilation Error Fixed:**
- `package net.lingala.zip4j.core does not exist` in `AllureCommandline.java:18`

**Root Cause:**
The zip4j library changed its package structure in version 2.x - `ZipFile` moved from `net.lingala.zip4j.core.ZipFile` to `net.lingala.zip4j.ZipFile`.

**Solution:**
Created a JavaParser-based transformation in `/workspace/javaparser-base-template/src/main/java/github/chains/Main.java` that:
1. Parses all Java files in a given directory
2. Finds imports with `net.lingala.zip4j.core.*`
3. Replaces them with `net.lingala.zip4j.*`

**Transformation Applied:**
- Fixed import: `net.lingala.zip4j.core.ZipFile` → `net.lingala.zip4j.ZipFile`

**Verification:**
- `mvn compile` now succeeds with 0 checkstyle violations
